recalls.Description: Tainoki Fine Furniture is recalling height-adjustable swivel office chairs intended for desk use due to a serious fall hazard. These chairs come with an upholstered padded seat, backrest, headrest, and two padded armrests supported by chrome-finished metal bars. The recall includes various models: the Noah Office Chair (model M7016O) available in Cream, Jiffy, French Roast, and Black; the Owen Office Chair (model M7004O) in Cream, Black, Merlin, Jiffy, and Wade; and the Warren Office Chair (model M7074O) in Taupe and Justin's. Model numbers can be found on the label located on the underside of the chair seat.
recalls.Title: Tainoki Fine Furniture Recalls Office Chairs Due to Fall Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Tainoki Fine Furniture at 888-698-2466 from 10 a.m. to 7 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, via email at hello@tainoki.com, or visit https://www.tainoki.com/recall. You can also go to https://www.tainoki.com and click on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Noah Office Chair (Model number: M70160)
Recalled Owen Office Chair (Model number: M70040)
Recalled Warren Office Chair (Model number: M70740)

Retailers.Name: Available at HomeGoods stores nationwide from August 2025 through December 2025, priced between $180 and $200.

Importers.Name: Tainoki Fine Furniture, of Brea, California

Hazards.Name: Fall hazard due to potential bending of the chair's base

Remedies.Name: Stop using the chairs immediately and visit https://www.tainoki.com/recall for recall instructions. Participants will need to submit photos of the chairs, model number, and proof of destruction for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Tainoki recalls office chairs due to fall hazard. Stop using and check for refund details.

recalls.Description: Clark Associates is recalling several models of Lancaster Table & Seating Powder-Coated Aluminum Outdoor Chairs and Barstools, available in arm chair, side chair, and barstool designs. These items were sold under 180 different item numbers and came in various colors including blue, brown, gray, red, white, and more. The chairs may have been sold with or without outdoor tables, which are not included in this recall. A complete list of affected item numbers can be found at www.webstaurantstore.com/uploads/Clark_Associates/2026/1/lts-recall-list-of-affected-products-1.pdf.
recalls.Title: Clark Associates Issues Recall for Lancaster Table & Seating Aluminum Outdoor Chairs and Barstools Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach out to Clark Associates at 800-285-8172, Monday through Friday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, or via email at pcachairsandbarstools@lancastertableandseating.com. Additional details are available at www.lancastertableandseating.com/recalls/powder-coated-aluminum-chairs or by visiting www.lancastertableandseating.com and selecting 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Lancaster Table & Seating Powder-Coated Aluminum Outdoor Chairs

Images.Caption: Recalled arm chair - gray
Recalled side chair - black
Recalled bar stool - silver

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 36 reports of broken or bent chair legs, resulting in four falls and three injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available through Clark Pro and Clark National Accounts across the U.S., as well as online at webstaurantstore.com, therestaurantstore.com, and quicksupply.com from April 2020 to October 2025, priced between $55 and $133.

Importers.Name: Clark Core Services LLC, dba Clark Associates, of Lancaster, Pennsylvania

Hazards.Name: Risk of legs bending or breaking during use, leading to potential falls.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the recalled items immediately and contact Clark Associates for a full refund or store credit. They are also advised to register their product online at www.lancastertableandseating.com/recalls/powder-coated-aluminum-chairs, label the product as 'Recalled' in a visible area, and dispose of it according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Clark Associates recalls aluminum outdoor chairs and barstools due to fall hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safety details.

recalls.Description: Crate & Barrel is recalling its Ana Dining Chairs due to a potential fall hazard caused by the possibility of the chair legs breaking. This recall affects specific SKU numbers: 108-976, 109-100, 109-117, 109-123, 121-287, 436-035, 436-074, 436-096, 436-123, 686-763, 686-774, 387-127, 387-135, 387-141, and 387-166, which can be found on the underside of the chair seat. Chairs sold after January 23, 2025, are not included in this recall. The affected chairs were available in various colors, including charcoal, gray, ivory, navy, gray velvet, camel velvet, and olive-green velvet.
recalls.Title: Crate & Barrel Recalls Ana Dining Chairs Due to Risk of Falling
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled chairs immediately and reach out to Crate & Barrel at 800-451-8217, available from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT on weekdays and 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT on weekends. Alternatively, contact them via email at recall@crateandbarrel.com or visit https://www.crateandbarrel.com/customer-service/product-recalls for more information.

Products.Name: Ana Dining Chair
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 54,930 (In addition, about 3,160 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Crate & Barrel Ana Dining Chairs
SKU Label location

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 149 reports of chair legs breaking, including 10 reports of injuries to the head, back, arms and face.

Retailers.Name: Available at Crate & Barrel stores and on Crateandbarrel.com from January 2021 to January 2025, priced between $300 and $350.

Importers.Name: Euromarket Designs, Inc., dba Crate & Barrel, of Northbrook, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Risk of chair legs breaking, leading to a fall hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers can receive a free replacement chair and arrange for the free pickup of the recalled chair.

recalls.metaDescription: Crate & Barrel recalls Ana Dining Chairs due to a fall hazard. Stop using them and contact for a free replacement.

recalls.Description: Veyer is recalling WorkPro Momentum office chairs due to a potential fall hazard. These ergonomic chairs, available in black (model 8517865) and gray (model 2864384), feature a metal frame, cushioned seating, five caster wheels, and a high back that can shift sideways. The model number can be found beneath the seat cushion for identification purposes.
recalls.Title: Veyer Issues Recall for WorkPro Momentum Office Chairs Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Veyer at 833-881-0087 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email support@momentumwarranty.com, or visit https://help.officedepot.com/app/answers/detail/a_id/7555/kw/recall or www.officedepot.com and navigate to the "Recall Notices" section at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled WorkPro Momentum Office Chair

Injuries.Name: Veyer has received seven reports of consumers falling out of the chair, resulting in two minor injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available at Office Depot and OfficeMax locations nationwide, as well as online through www.amazon.com, www.officedepot.com, www.walmart.com, www.ebay.com, and other retailers from October 2021 to September 2024, priced around $430.

Importers.Name: Veyer LLC, of Boca Raton, Florida

Hazards.Name: Potential fall hazard due to bolt failure connecting chair back to base.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the recalled chairs immediately and reach out to Veyer for a complimentary repair kit, which includes shipping and installation instructions. The kit contains a back bracket, three bolts, an Allen wrench, and a decorative cover. Veyer will directly contact all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Veyer recalls WorkPro Momentum office chairs due to a fall hazard. Contact for free repair kit and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Grand Rapids Chair Company is recalling its Brooke model wood dining chairs due to a potential fall hazard. This recall affects all styles of wood dining chairs, which may have partially or fully upholstered seats and backs. The model numbers W520, W520-11, W520-21, W520-31, and W520-33 can be located on the original order confirmation or invoice. If these documents are unavailable, consumers can find the Special Order Number ("SO#") on the white sticker located underneath each chair. A detailed list of affected special order numbers is available on their website.
recalls.Title: Grand Rapids Chair Company Issues Recall for Brooke Wood Dining Chairs Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled chairs immediately and contact Grand Rapids Chair Company at 866-453-4748 Ext. 147 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also reach out via email at retrofits@grandrapidschair.com or visit www.grandrapidschair.com/customer-service/product-safety-recall-brooke/ for further assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled Woodseat Chair (model W520-11)
Recalled partially upholstered seat chair (model W520-21)
Recalled fully upholstered seat & back (model W520-33)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports report of the chair breaking. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Grand Rapids Chair Company, of Byron Center, Michigan

Retailers.Name: Available through special orders made between January 2020 and June 2024, priced between $450 and $1,015

Hazards.Name: Fall Hazard due to potential shifting, breaking, or collapsing

Remedies.Name: Free repair service provided by Grand Rapids Chair Company personnel at the consumer's location

recalls.metaDescription: Grand Rapids Chair Company recalls Brooke wood dining chairs due to fall hazards. Contact for free repairs and safety information.

recalls.Description: Ross Stores has announced a recall for wicker-style armchairs featuring a plastic cross weave on the seat, back, and sides, supported by dark metal frames. These armchairs are available in two color combinations: green/white (SKU 400266563392) and gray/white (SKU 400266563330). Each chair stands approximately 33 inches tall, 28 inches deep, and 26 inches wide, with the SKU number located on a sticker on the leg and a hangtag on the back.
recalls.Title: Ross Stores Issues Recall for Wicker-Style Armchairs Due to Fall Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Ross Stores at 800-335-1115, available from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. You can also reach them via email at customer.inquiries@ros.com or visit www.rossstores.com/recalls. For more details, click on 'Legal Notices & Recalled Products' at the bottom of the homepage.

Images.Caption: Recalled Armchair – green
Recalled Armchair – gray

Injuries.Name: The firm has received five reports of the chair legs breaking; four resulting in minor injuries, including soreness and contusions.

Retailers.Name: Available at Ross stores across the nation from February 2024 to April 2024 for approximately $50.

Importers.Name: Ross Procurement Inc., of Dublin, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of leg bending or breaking, leading to falls and injuries.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the armchairs immediately and return them to any Ross store for a full refund or a $50 store credit, no receipt required.

recalls.metaDescription: Ross Stores recalls wicker-style armchairs due to fall hazards. Return for a full refund or store credit. Contact for details.

recalls.Description: Article has issued a recall for Spin Swivel Chairs due to a potential fall hazard. These upholstered chairs feature gold-colored stainless steel swivel legs and were available in ivory, gray, orange, and blue. Each chair measures approximately 32.5 inches in height, 32 inches in depth, and 30.5 inches in width.
recalls.Title: Recall of Spin Swivel Chairs Due to Fall Risk; Imported by Article
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Article at 888-746-3455 from 6 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, and 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT on weekends. Alternatively, they can email service@article.com or visit https://www.article.com/c/spin-recall for more details.

Products.Name: Spin Swivel Chairs
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 4,500 (In addition, about 140 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Spin Swivel Chair in Calcite Ivory
Recalled Spin Swivel Chair in Desert Gray
Recalled Spin Swivel Chair in Sunset Orange
Recalled Spin Swivel Chair in Ink Blue

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 190 reports of the base of the swivel chair breaking. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at article.com from July 2021 to June 2023, priced around $700.

Importers.Name: Trademango Solutions Inc., dba Article, of Canada

Hazards.Name: Risk of base breaking, leading to potential falls.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the chairs immediately and contact Article for a complimentary replacement base and installation guidance. Article will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Spin Swivel Chairs recalled due to fall hazard. Contact Article for a free replacement base and installation instructions.

recalls.Description: Clark Associates has recalled the Allegro plastic side chairs from Lancaster Table & Seating due to a potential fall hazard. These outdoor chairs were available in 14 vibrant colors and are marked with the brand name on their undersides. Each chair is made from glass-reinforced polypropylene, measuring approximately 17 inches in width and 33 inches in height.
recalls.Title: Clark Associates Issues Recall for Allegro Plastic Side Chairs Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Clark Associates at 844-895-5694 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Alternatively, you can email allegro@lancastertableandseating.com or visit lancastertableandseating.com/recalls/allegro-side-chair-recall/ for more details. Additional information is available at www.therestaurantstore.com and www.webstaurantstore.com under the 'Safety Recall' section.

Images.Caption: Recalled Lancaster Table & Seating Allegro plastic side chair
Recalled Lancaster Table & Seating Allegro plastic side chair stamp on underside of plastic side chair

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 16 reports of chairs breaking apart while in use, resulting in two injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available through Clark Pro and Clark National Accounts across the country, as well as online at www.webstaurantstore.com and www.therestaurantstore.com from November 2020 to August 2023, priced between $45 and $66.

Importers.Name: Clark Core Services LLC, d/b/a Clark Associates, of Lancaster, Pennsylvania

Hazards.Name: Risk of breaking apart during use, leading to a fall hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the Allegro plastic side chairs immediately and contact Clark Associates for a full refund or store credit. A photograph must be submitted online showing 'DO NOT USE' clearly marked on the chairs, and the product should be disposed of. Clark Associates will directly notify all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Clark Associates recalls Allegro plastic side chairs due to fall hazards. Stop using them and contact for a refund or store credit.
